en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Worker Registry in the Spain Social Security Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The worker‑in‑force report for a Contribution Account Code (CCC) is an employer report listing all workers currently registered under that CCC, and it is requested online through the Social Security electronic office by the company or its authorized representative. The report can be requested and obtained through the TGSS website.
Please upload your current worker-in-force report for your company’s Contribution Account Code (CCC), issued by the Spanish Social Security Treasury (TGSS).
As an authorized signatory, I confirm that our employees' registration with the Social Security system is up-to-date and compliant, and records are available upon request.
